matrix.ac_text: Mandatory fields name and primary phone must be provided.
Email must be unique across active customers.
Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
Audit history must capture previous and new values.
Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.

readable.acText: Mandatory fields name and primary phone must be provided.
readable.title: Customer profile update succeeds when name and primary phone are both provided via UI

readable.acText: Mandatory fields name and primary phone must be provided.
readable.title: API returns HTTP 200 and persists update when name and primary phone are provided in PUT request

readable.acText: Mandatory fields name and primary phone must be provided.
readable.title: Profile update API response time remains under 2 seconds under concurrent load of 50 requests

readable.acText: Mandatory fields name and primary phone must be provided.
readable.title: Database correctly persists updated name and primary phone after successful profile update

readable.acText: Mandatory fields name and primary phone must be provided.
readable.title: Blank name field triggers inline validation error and blocks save on UI

readable.acText: Mandatory fields name and primary phone must be provided.
readable.title: API returns HTTP 400 with field-level error when primary phone is missing from request body

readable.acText: Mandatory fields name and primary phone must be provided.
readable.title: Rejected profile update with missing name does not persist partial data in database

readable.acText: Mandatory fields name and primary phone must be provided.
readable.title: Name field at maximum 150-character boundary and phone with international format are accepted

readable.acText: Email must be unique across active customers.
readable.title: Unique email is accepted and profile updates successfully via UI

readable.acText: Email must be unique across active customers.
readable.title: API accepts unique email and returns HTTP 200 with updated profile

readable.acText: Email must be unique across active customers.
readable.title: Email uniqueness validation API response time stays within SLA under concurrent load

readable.acText: Email must be unique across active customers.
readable.title: Database confirms unique email is persisted correctly after successful profile update

readable.acText: Email must be unique across active customers.
readable.title: Duplicate active customer email is blocked with inline error in UI

readable.acText: Email must be unique across active customers.
readable.title: API rejects duplicate active customer email with HTTP 409 conflict

readable.acText: Email must be unique across active customers.
readable.title: Database unique constraint prevents duplicate email insertion for active customers

readable.acText: Email must be unique across active customers.
readable.title: ETL batch rejects duplicate email records and routes them to error queue

readable.acText: Email must be unique across active customers.
readable.title: Email belonging to an inactive customer is accepted for a new active customer via UI

readable.acText: Email must be unique across active customers.
readable.title: API accepts case-variant email that differs only by casing from an existing active customer email

readable.acText: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
readable.title: Authorized Customer_Service_Agent successfully updates customer profile via UI

readable.acText: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
readable.title: Authorized Customer_Service_Agent successfully updates customer profile via API

readable.acText: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
readable.title: Unauthorized Billing_Analyst role cannot see Edit button on customer profile UI

readable.acText: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
readable.title: API rejects profile update request bearing unauthorized Billing_Analyst token with HTTP 403

readable.acText: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
readable.title: Security: Brute-force authorization bypass attempts are rate-limited and logged

readable.acText: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
readable.title: Database does not persist profile changes when update is attempted by unauthorized role

readable.acText: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
readable.title: Expired bearer token is rejected by API with HTTP 401 when attempting profile update

readable.acText: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
readable.title: API denies unauthenticated request with no bearer token returning HTTP 401

readable.acText: Audit history must capture previous and new values.
readable.title: Successful profile update via UI creates audit history entry showing previous and new values

readable.acText: Audit history must capture previous and new values.
readable.title: API profile update with valid data returns audit trail in response body containing previous and new values

readable.acText: Audit history must capture previous and new values.
readable.title: Audit history API response time remains under 500ms when customer has 500 prior audit records

readable.acText: Audit history must capture previous and new values.
readable.title: Audit record in database stores exact old and new values with correct metadata after API profile update

readable.acText: Audit history must capture previous and new values.
readable.title: ETL audit extraction job correctly transfers audit records with old and new values to reporting warehouse

readable.acText: Audit history must capture previous and new values.
readable.title: Failed profile update due to missing mandatory field does not create an audit record in database

readable.acText: Audit history must capture previous and new values.
readable.title: Updating multiple fields in a single UI save creates separate audit entries for each changed field

readable.acText: Audit history must capture previous and new values.
readable.title: Submitting identical values via API produces no new audit record when no fields actually change

readable.acText: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
readable.title: UI profile update for customer triggers CRM sync and reflects updated contact details in downstream CRM

readable.acText: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
readable.title: Successful customer profile update via API triggers CRM sync job and propagates updated data to downstream CRM

readable.acText: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
readable.title: CRM sync API response time remains within SLA under expected concurrent profile update load

readable.acText: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
readable.title: Database sync queue record is created with correct change details after customer profile update

readable.acText: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
readable.title: ETL sync job picks up profile update and successfully delivers transformed payload to CRM

readable.acText: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
readable.title: Profile update with no actual field change does not generate a CRM sync queue entry

readable.acText: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
readable.title: ETL sync job transforms outbound payload with correct field mapping and data formatting for CRM

readable.acText: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
readable.title: CRM sync job logs error and marks record for retry when downstream CRM is unreachable
